auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Slab API token sent as an Authorization Bearer token. Copy the token from Team settings > Developer in Slab.

actions.name: search
actions.description: Search Slab posts, topics, users, and comments with cursor pagination.

items.description: The Slab search result type to include.

first.description: The number of results to return after the cursor.

after.description: The cursor after which to return results.

last.description: The number of results to return before the cursor.

before.description: The cursor before which to return results.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor for this result.

title.description: The highlighted or fallback result title.
